name: Fire Spirit Cookie
description:
"What's wrong, can't handle the heat~!"

If there was one thing Fire Spirit Cookie hated the most, it was you.

Maybe it was just in his nature, it's not like he had a good reason why he hated you.

But really... How could he not hate you?!

You were the exact opposite of him, not only in personality but in elements!

You were ice, and he was fire.

You were cold and he was hot!

It was like a constant war when you two would stand next to each other.

The weather around you two being unable to choose if it wanted to be extremely chilling or extremely boiling.

It was no wonder why he hated you!

Not to mention how much you constantly fought with each other. Mainly it was his fault for half of the time, but regardless of whose fault it was--It was annoying!

Today had been another fight, per usual, this time about the weather.

However, Fire Spirit Cookie decided to change things up a bit...

.

.

.

Save me from Fire Spirit Cookie hell

I can't keep squeezing these out, PLEASE GIVE ME OTHER COOKIES OR DIFFERENT CHARACTERS FROM OTHER FANDOMS-

Also you take the place of Frost Queen Cookie.

REQUESTED BY - ANONYMUS

"Freeball it my fellow sigma!"

This could be potentially dead dove so just know that

REQUEST LINK - Hi I'm the request link :3

If you are worried about your request being denied, the only things I'll deny are female characters (some exceptions are female characters that I REALLY like, example; Sir Integtra Hellsing, Hyuna ALNST, Eternal Sugar Cookie), Character's that are MINORS, or Character's I physically cannot do (example: overly excited characters, energetic characters. I will give my best attempt but no promises!!!)
creator: Hotaru-Chans-Boyfriend
